content: I'm wondering what each awakener nationalities,it would be cool
some might be really easy (like londonium and cleveland) but others might be much harder either because theyre fictional names or gpt mangled it to unrecognisation (lai/rai, lemwashi)
Well, while it's a sort of alternative earth (not 1:1 country or world), you can sometimes tell which culture or country inspired a particular location or group
and idk if Leo is supposed to be england equivalent
for one, it's safe to assume that thats the place mythag and londinium is located
But yeah, since Kadath is a fictional world it's not 1:1
yeah it's probably *in part* inspired by it
but perhaps by other cities or periods as well
sometimes the inspiration is a mix of different periods or locations
and some are just weird, like the Philistines (some of which irl are coastal but also very inland)
Iirc Assyrians are considered middle easterns, and the Aramites branched out from them
or at least Kadath's version of the Assyrians
that seems more or less correct
do we have any idea where akut is?
no idea
man
maybe we'll see it in flashbacks one day
Iirc Sanga is from Cité so I'm guessing it's the equivalent or a parallel to France
I do like that several characters are intended to be from very different places or cultures
I'd be interested in a map of Kadath someday
some wikipediaing later, i think its referencing the Île de la Cité, an island on the seine river
Ooh
I'll have to ask next time I'm going near the Seine
oh you're near enough to check it out?

oh sorel is german (Constance)
actually she’s French
one of Sorel references is Agnes Sorel

Agnès Sorel, known by the sobriquet Dame de beauté (Lady of Beauty), was a favourite and chief mistress of King Charles VII of France, by whom she bore four daughters.[1] She is considered the first officially recognized royal mistress of a French king. She was the subject of several contemporary paintings and works of art, including Jean Fouquet's Virgin and Child Surrounded by Angels.
